backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the address update to Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, India was applied in Location.tsx and Footer.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key content.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, borders, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the STA Sea Foods React app, mounting the app at the root div and loading the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, Location, Contact, and Footer with section IDs for smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section displaying phone, email, and business hours cards with clickable tel/mailto links and a navy CTA banner with action buttons.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer showing the STA Sea Foods brand, full address (Thuckalay, Kanyakumari District), both phone numbers, email, quick nav links, and a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background image, navy gradient overlay, animated wave SVG, large serif heading, tagline, CTA buttons, and stat badges.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Location section embedding an OpenStreetMap iframe centered on coordinates 8.120236, 77.454371, with address cards showing Thuckalay, Kalkulam Taluk, Kanyakumari District, Tamil Nadu – 629175, operating hours, and a directions link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar for STA Sea Foods with smooth scroll links, a logo, desktop nav buttons, and a mobile sheet drawer that collapses on link click.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 6-card services grid showcasing cold storage offerings (cold storage, fish handling, distribution, temperature monitoring, rapid processing, quality assurance) with icons and highlight badges.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers, CSS custom properties for a maritime color palette, and utility classes for wave dividers and text gradients.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom navy, seafoam, and sand color scales, Playfair Display/Inter fonts, custom box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state, version, and feature list for the STA Sea Foods single-page website, including all implemented features like navigation, hero, services, location, contact sections, and visual theme.
